name: gypsy_hotspot_chr3L_61A_flam_target
description: Drosophila TE insertion hotspot: gypsy insertion sink near 61A — chr3L distal end accumulates gypsy insertions; flamenco piRNA cluster on X is the master regulator. Drosophila genomes carry ~15-20% TE content. Insertion hotspots reflect both target-site preference and lower selection in low-recombination regions. Reads hitting these regions are typically misplaced unless full-length insertion-specific anchors are available.
expected_copy_count: 10-100 copies of the named TE family genome-wide; locally enriched 3-10x baseline
